case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KATTY MAY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAY, KATTY $5,788.41 PRINCIPAL, $967.38 INTEREST, $286.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,041.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $286.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MAY, KATTY
